HomePage.title: Create Stunning Images for Free Online
HomePage.description: Boost your image editing efficiency by 10x with advanced AI, powerful editing tools, and seamless converters.
HomePage.aiImageGeneratorDesc: Generate high-quality images using advanced AI technology, supporting multiple styles and resolutions
HomePage.imageEditorDesc: Powerful online image editing tool with rich features like cropping, filters, and adjustments
HomePage.formatConverterDesc: Quickly convert various formats including images, documents, and videos while maintaining high quality
HomePage.videoEditorDesc: Online video editing tool supporting cutting, merging, and adding special effects
HomePage.documentConverterDesc: Fast conversion tool for document formats like PDF, Word, and Excel
HomePage.aiTextAssistantDesc: Intelligent text processing and generation tool supporting translation, summarization, and rewriting
HomePage.noToolsDesc: Stay tuned for more AI tools coming soon

AboutPage.title: Explore the Boundaries of AI, Be Your Exclusive Productivity Compass.
AboutPage.subtitle: Hello, we are Heguang Studio. This is our dedicated AI Pure Workshop.
AboutPage.story1: As heavy AI users and developers, we've had enough of cluttered AI bookmarks and marketing-style tool recommendations everywhere. We crave a clean, fast, ad-free "digital toolbox".
AboutPage.story2: So, Heguang Studio wrote the first line of code for iChengHub. This is not a cold commercial project, but our internal "Hot Recommend Workshop" fully opened to you. We hope it can not only become our efficiency hub but also help you, bridging the information gap in the AI era.
AboutPage.feature1Desc: Heguang Studio doesn't pursue quantity. Every tool here has been thoroughly tested by our team. We hope this is a pure haven, helping you filter out those useless copycat products.
AboutPage.feature2Desc: Provide advanced Prompts that can truly be put into production.
AboutPage.wechatDesc: Scan to follow, get latest AI tool reviews and beta codes
AboutPage.xiaohongshuDesc: AI productivity hacks and indie developer stories
AboutPage.ctaText: Alone we go fast, together we go far. If you've found great tools or have efficiency challenges, feel free to connect with us.
AboutPage.ctaButton: ⚡️ Submit Pain Point / Wish for Tool
